case_title: REYNALDO BERRIOS VS. PATRICIA LOHIDOY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED APR-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAGOS, GENEVIE DBA LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL INC.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PATRICIA LOHIDOY, AND CARLOS OSORIO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-13-2013 AT 6:30 PM.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GALLAGOS, GENEVIE DBA LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERRIOS, REYNALDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GALLAGOS, GENEVIE DBA LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL INC. PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS AGAINST PATRICIA LOHIDOY AND CARLOS OSORIO ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY BERRIOS, REYNALDO AS TO DEFENDANT LOHIDOY, PATRICIA OSORIO, CARLOS GALLAGOS, GENEVIE DBA LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANTS PATRICIA LOHIDOY AND CARLOS OSORIO. DEFENDANT GENEVIE GALLEGOS WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CORPORATION. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GENEIVE GALLEGOS--EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
